creator: shafaisal.us@gmail.com
text:
Hi mark,

below are the debug prints in kmem_alloc_contig

dmat lowaddr=0xffffffff, dmat highaddr= 0xffffffffffffffff, dmat maxsize 0x8000000

In case kmem_alloc_contig
Args to kmem_alloc_contig are 
dmat->alloc_size = 0x08000000, 
mflags= 0x102,
dmat->common.lowaddr = 0xffffffff,
dmat->alloc_alignment= 0x1000,
dmat->common.boundary = 0x0,
attr= 0x2

Regards
Faisal
